ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the suggestion */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the suggested bike share site */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suggestion */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the suggestion was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating assigned to the suggestion by administrators */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the suggestion (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who reviewed the suggestion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggestions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggestions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suggestion being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating assigned to the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment accompanying the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who reviewed the review */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_suggestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggestion_id") REFERENCES suggestions ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suggestion being rated */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value assigned */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale for the assigned rating */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who assigned the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_suggestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggestion_id") REFERENCES suggestions ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the neighborhood */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_sets" (
  "submission_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission set */,
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suggestion included in the set */,
  "support_length" INTEGER /* Number of supporters for the suggestion */,
  "support_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the suggestion's support page */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission set (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the submission set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_sets_suggestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggestion_id") REFERENCES suggestions ("suggestion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the profile */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL linking to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "interests" TEXT /* User's interests */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suggestion being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the suggestion */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was logged */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the suggestion */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the suggestion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_suggestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggestion_id") REFERENCES suggestions ("suggestion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geometry" (
  "geometry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geometric entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location with the geometric data */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates for the location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the geometric entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the geometric entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the geometric entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geometry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geometry_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geometry_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
